title: 世界を変えるダージリン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro Dober wants to buy some tea, so
she heads to the mall to sample different
varieties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This Darjeeling is good... It has a nice, mellow
aftertaste and is so fragrant as it goes down.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hey, girl! I see you like my tea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? You're the one who brewed this?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was chosen to give out samples for my
talents. My method of making world-changing tea
has been wildly popular!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know there was such a way to brew tea...
Do you happen to, uh, offer lessons for that?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So you want to seize the world too? Very well! I'll
teach you everything you need to know!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
First, you need to put tea leaves into a warmed
teapot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay! I put the leaves in!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
After you pour the hot water in, close the lid, and
encourage the tea leaves in different languages
while they steep!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Wait... Encourage the leaves in different
languages? What?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
T-tea leaves... become mucho delicioso, s'il vous
plaît...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh... Wo ai ni!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, very good! I know it's a little embarrassing,
but the tea leaves appreciate the gesture!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: D-does this really make it taste better?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Try it and see for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sip... Hm?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it? By showing appreciation to the leaves
that have traveled all the way here from abroad—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I see! Doing so lets the leaves steep for just the
right amount of time, thus perfectly drawing out
their flavor! A basic but important step!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Really? I thought it was about Umamusume and
tea coming together across the species barrier...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know about that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But this helped remind me of the basics. I've been
so busy lately that I forget to let the leaves steep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Mejiro Dober's movements are
sharper than usual during training!
